reviews.comment:
Soy clienta habitual (por cuestiones de salud viajo seguido a Bahia Blanca). Las chicas del shop sou geniales pero la señora que limpia los baños tiene una satisfacción de tratar mal a la gente!! Es la 2vez que voy y no me deja entrar al baño argumentando que está mojado. Y sus modos de hablar son terribles. (Pero cuando me alejo deja pasar a otras señoras. )

(Translated by Google)
I'm a regular customer (I travel to Bahia Blanca frequently for health reasons). The shop girls are great, but the woman who cleans the bathrooms takes real pleasure in treating people badly! This is the second time I've been there and she won't let me use the bathroom, claiming it's wet. And her manner of speaking is awful. (But when I walk away, she lets other women in.)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11465332764445308403/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR4MWZxUXBnRRAB
